summary: Security Skill Deepening: FP verification gate for harness-ignore suppressions, SEC-DEF-* insecure defaults rules + AI review guidance, SEC-EDGE-* sharp-edges rules (deprecated crypto, unsafe deser, TOCTOU, stringly-typed security), and harness:supply-chain-audit skill with 6-factor dependency risk evaluation.

decisions.what: FP gate uses inline comment-parsing with required justification
decisions.why: Simplest approach; skeptical analysis confirmed one-line justification suffices

decisions.what: Insecure defaults uses layered detection (mechanical + AI)
decisions.why: Follows existing Principle 7 split — machine first, AI second

decisions.what: Supply-chain audit uses Trail of Bits 6-factor model
decisions.why: Battle-tested factors, all mechanically checkable via npm registry + GitHub API
Roadmap says narrowed to known dangerous patterns; timing-safe and redirects deferred to AI

decisions.what: Sharp-edges rules get dedicated SEC-EDGE-* category
decisions.why: Conceptually distinct from vulnerability categories — these are API misuse patterns
Scanner enhancements are low-risk high-value; supply-chain has external API dependencies needing focused attention
